title: Three-layer architecture correctly separates concerns
description: The lexer → form → evaluator split is the right call. The form layer is a uniform Vec<Form> representation that makes adding Sieve extensions purely an evaluator concern — no parser changes. A reviewer might suggest collapsing the form layer into a typed AST with per-command structs; resist this. The uniform form representation is the central design insight of the crate and is documented in CLAUDE.md and the crate docstring. It is correctly positioned.
